name: Almond-Toffee Triangles
recipeInstructions:
Press the dough into an ungreased jelly roll pan, 15-1/2 x 10-1/2 x 1 inches. Sprinkle with almond brickle chips and press lightly. Bake until light brown, about 25 minutes. Cool for 10 minutes before cutting into squares (2-1/2 inches). Cut each square diagonally into halves. Remove immediately from the pan. Makes about 4 dozen bars.
Almond-Cardamom Triangles: Add 1 teaspoon ground cardamom with the flour and salt. Substitute 1/2 cup toasted diced almonds for the brickle chips.
Chocolate-Spice Triangles: Add 1 teaspoon ground cinnamon with the flour and salt. Substitute 1 package (12 oz) of semisweet chocolate chips for the brickle chips.
Macadamia Nut Triangles: Add 1 teaspoon ground ginger with the flour and salt. Substitute 1/2 cup chopped salted macadamia nuts for the brickle chips.
